entities.name: Royal Palace

details.description: A broad gravel forecourt opens onto the main east façade of a large neoclassical palace. The building has a pale yellow plastered exterior with a rusticated light-gray ground floor, a symmetrical rhythm of rectangular windows, and a central portico with a pediment supported by a colonnade of classical columns. A decorative balustrade runs along the roofline. A red royal standard flag flies from the roof. Ornate lampposts line the front and small sentry boxes stand near the entrance. The scene is shot in soft evening light under a clear sky. In the foreground, a person walks across the square, emphasizing the scale of the open plaza.

details.description: A grand neoclassical building with a pale yellow façade and a prominent colonnaded portico on the left, featuring tall white columns supporting a triangular pediment. The ground level shows arched openings, while the upper floors have evenly spaced rectangular windows with white trim. A flag flutters atop the roof. In the foreground is a vast open square with a reddish gravel surface, likely Slottsplassen in Oslo. A man wearing a white t-shirt, light trousers, a backpack, and sunglasses walks across the square, talking on a phone. The lighting suggests late afternoon or early evening, with a clear sky and soft shadows. The overall scene identifies the royal residence facing the square, with the surrounding urban open space and a calm, ceremonial atmosphere.

details.description: A wide-angle photo taken at dusk shows a large, pale-yellow neoclassical palace with a central portico supported by tall white columns and a symmetrical façade of evenly spaced windows. A red flag with a gold emblem flies from the roofline. The scene is viewed across a broad gravel forecourt; a lone pedestrian in light clothing with a backpack walks across the square in the foreground while a uniformed guard is visible near the main entrance. The sky is clear, giving the building crisp, even light.

details.description: A man walking across a large open forecourt in front of a grand neoclassical yellow building with a row of tall white columns supporting a pediment. The facade features multiple evenly spaced windows and a stone base. A flag flies atop the roof. The scene is outdoors on a clear day with soft lighting, and the square appears to be Slottsplassen in Oslo, Norway, with the Royal Palace nearby. The man wears a white t-shirt, light-colored trousers, dark shoes, a backpack, sunglasses, and is on the phone, mid-stride from left to right.

details.description: A low-angle, eye-level shot capturing a man walking across a large, open gravel square in the foreground, with the Royal Palace of Oslo dominating the background. The man, seen in profile walking from right to left, wears a white t-shirt, cream-colored corduroy trousers, dark sneakers, and carries a black backpack while talking on a mobile phone; he has sunglasses perched on his head. The background features the Royal Palace (Det kongelige slott), a grand neoclassical building with a pale yellow stucco facade. The central section projects forward with a temple-front portico supported by six Ionic columns and topped with a pediment. The building has three main stories with rows of rectangular sash windows and a flat roofline adorned with a balustrade. Atop the central roof, the Royal Standard of Norway (red with a golden lion) is flying, indicating the monarch's presence or official capacity. The sky is a clear, gradient blue, suggesting late afternoon or early evening light.

details.description: A wide-angle shot of the Royal Palace in Oslo, Norway, taken from the expansive Slottsplassen square. The palace is a large, three-story neoclassical building with a pale yellow facade and white architectural details. Its central feature is a prominent portico with six white columns supporting a triangular pediment. The ground floor features a series of arched openings. A red flag with a golden lion, the Royal Standard of Norway, is visible flying from the roof. In the foreground, a man wearing a white t-shirt, light-colored trousers, and a black backpack is walking across the reddish-gravel surface of the square while talking on a mobile phone. The lighting is soft, suggesting late afternoon or early evening under a clear sky.

details.description: Oblique view of a large neoclassical palace with a pale yellow facade and symmetrical rows of sash windows. The central section features a grand colonnaded portico with a triangular pediment and arched openings at ground level, executed in a paler stone. A tall flagpole on the roof flies a red flag, and the building fronts a vast reddish gravel forecourt. The sky is clear with soft evening light. A passerby is in the foreground walking across the square, emphasizing the scale of the palace.

details.description: A full-length adult male stands on a broad, dusty open forecourt in front of a large neoclassical building with a pale yellow facade. The building features a symmetrical arrangement of tall rectangular windows, white columns supporting a portico, and an arched ground-floor arcade. A flagpole with a red flag is mounted near the facade. The man wears an all-white outfit (t-shirt, pants), a black backpack, brown belt, dark shoes, sunglasses atop his head, and has a tattoo on his left forearm. The lighting is bright and daytime, suggesting a sunny day. The photo appears slightly rotated, with the imposing building occupying the left half and the open plaza on the right where the subject stands.

details.description: A large yellow neoclassical palace with a central portico of columns and a triangular pediment faces a broad gravel forecourt. A small national flag flies from the roofline. White sentry boxes flank arched entrances at the base of the portico. A casually dressed man with a backpack walks across the open square in the foreground under clear evening light.

details.description: The image captures a scene on a large, open gravel square, likely Slottsplassen, with a man walking in the foreground wearing white trousers, a white t-shirt, and a black backpack while talking on a mobile phone. The image is oriented sideways (rotated 90 degrees clockwise). In the background stands the Royal Palace (Det kongelige slott) in Oslo, a prominent pale yellow neoclassical building. The facade features a central portico with columns, a balcony, and a regular grid of rectangular windows. A flag, identified as the Royal Standard of Norway (red with a golden lion), flies from the roof, indicating the presence of the monarch. The lighting suggests late afternoon with long shadows cast on the reddish gravel.

details.description: A large neoclassical building with a pale yellow facade and white architectural details. The central part of the building features a prominent portico with six large white columns supporting a triangular pediment. The building has multiple rows of rectangular windows and a flat roofline with a decorative balustrade. In the foreground, a person is walking across a wide, open square covered in reddish-brown gravel. The lighting suggests late afternoon or early morning, with soft shadows. A flag is visible flying from the roof of the palace.
